languages.text: "Все верно. Я и мой сын приходимся мастеру Толиман дальними родственниками. Наша семья верой и правдой служит кораблю, а священные импланты, подобные нашим, вместе с должностью передаются из поколения в поколение". {n}Старик склоняет голову в поклоне.{/n}

"Indeed. My son and I are distant relatives of Vox Master Toliman. Our family serves the ship faithfully, and sacred implants like ours are passed down from generation to generation along with our position." {n}The old man inclines his head in a bow.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Все верно. Я и мой сын приходимся мастеру Толиман дальними родственниками. Наша семья верой и правдой служит кораблю, а священные импланты, подобные нашим, вместе с должностью передаются из поколения в поколение". {n}Старик склоняет голову в поклоне.{/n}

languages.text: 「確かに。息子と私はヴォックス・マスター・トリムンの遠い親戚です。私たちの家族は船に忠実に仕え、私たちのような聖なるインプラントは、世代を超えて職と共に受け継がれています」{n}老人は頭を下げて敬礼する.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Indeed. My son and I are distant relatives of Vox Master Toliman. Our family serves the ship faithfully, and sacred implants like ours are passed down from generation to generation along with our position." {n}The old man inclines his head in a bow.{/n}

languages.text: "Doğrudur. Oğlum ve ben, Voks Üstadı Toliman'ın uzak akrabalarıyız. Ailemiz gemiye sadakatle hizmet ediyor ve bizimki gibi kutsal implantlar, konumumuzla birlikte nesilden nesle aktarılıyor." {n}Yaşlı adam başını eğiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Indeed. My son and I are distant relatives of Vox Master Toliman. Our family serves the ship faithfully, and sacred implants like ours are passed down from generation to generation along with our position." {n}The old man inclines his head in a bow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Doğrudur. Oğlum ve ben, Voks Üstadı Toliman'ın uzak akrabalarıyız. Ailemiz gemiye sadakatle hizmet ediyor ve bizimki gibi kutsal implantlar, konumumuzla birlikte nesilden nesle aktarılıyor." {n}Yaşlı adam başını eğiyor.{/n}

languages.text: “没错。犬子与我是音阵大师托里曼的远亲。我们家族世代忠诚侍奉本舰。我们佩戴的这类神圣植入物会随着职务代代相传。”{n}年长者垂首致意。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Indeed. My son and I are distant relatives of Vox Master Toliman. Our family serves the ship faithfully, and sacred implants like ours are passed down from generation to generation along with our position." {n}The old man inclines his head in a bow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “没错。犬子与我是音阵大师托里曼的远亲。我们家族世代忠诚侍奉本舰。我们佩戴的这类神圣植入物会随着职务代代相传。”{n}年长者垂首致意。{/n}

languages.text: "In der Tat. Mein Sohn und ich sind entfernte Verwandte von Voxmeisterin Toliman. Unsere Familie leistet dem Schiff treue Dienste und heilige Implantate wie die unseren werden ebenso wie unsere Position von Generation zu Generation weitergegeben." {n}Der alte Mann senkt seinen Kopf und verneigt sich.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Indeed. My son and I are distant relatives of Vox Master Toliman. Our family serves the ship faithfully, and sacred implants like ours are passed down from generation to generation along with our position." {n}The old man inclines his head in a bow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "In der Tat. Mein Sohn und ich sind entfernte Verwandte von Voxmeisterin Toliman. Unsere Familie leistet dem Schiff treue Dienste und heilige Implantate wie die unseren werden ebenso wie unsere Position von Generation zu Generation weitergegeben." {n}Der alte Mann senkt seinen Kopf und verneigt sich.{/n}

languages.text: « En effet, {n}répond le vieil homme avec un hochement de tête.{/n} Mon fils et moi-même sommes des parents éloignés de la maîtresse-vox Toliman. Notre famille sert à bord de ce vaisseau de longue date, et les implants sacrés comme les nôtres se transmettent de génération en génération en même temps que nos attributions. »
languages.original_text: "Indeed. My son and I are distant relatives of Vox Master Toliman. Our family serves the ship faithfully, and sacred implants like ours are passed down from generation to generation along with our position." {n}The old man inclines his head in a bow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « En effet, {n}répond le vieil homme avec un hochement de tête.{/n} Mon fils et moi-même sommes des parents éloignés de la maîtresse-vox Toliman. Notre famille sert à bord de ce vaisseau de longue date, et les implants sacrés comme les nôtres se transmettent de génération en génération en même temps que nos attributions. »

languages.text: «Así es. Mi hijo y yo somos parientes lejanos de la maestra de vocos Toliman. Nuestra familia sirve fielmente a la nave y transmitimos los implantes sagrados de generación en generación, igual que hacemos con el cargo». {n}El anciano hace una reverencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Indeed. My son and I are distant relatives of Vox Master Toliman. Our family serves the ship faithfully, and sacred implants like ours are passed down from generation to generation along with our position." {n}The old man inclines his head in a bow.{/n}
